statement: If x_N=R_aug,N f_N converges to x and the finite quotient norms are bounded, then x belongs to X_aug and ||x||_{X_aug} <= liminf ||x_N||_{X_aug,N}.

moscoLiminfInputStatus.label: Mosco liminf input
moscoLiminfInputStatus.reason: Bounded graph-energy representatives have weak graph-form subsequential limits.

traceConvergenceInputStatus.label: augmented trace convergence input
traceConvergenceInputStatus.reason: Strong graph-dual trace convergence identifies the limiting trace coordinate.

traceQuotientLiminfStatus.label: trace quotient liminf
traceQuotientLiminfStatus.reason: Choose near-minimizing representatives f_N.  Mosco liminf gives a weak limit f with norm at most the liminf, and trace convergence identifies R_aug f=x.

proof: Choose finite representatives f_N near the finite quotient norms.
Use liminf compactness to obtain a weak graph limit f.
Use trace convergence to identify x=R_aug f.
Use lower semicontinuity of the graph norm to get the quotient lower bound.
